decisions.decision: T_int = T_sel / ln(d0/SOI) for warp timing calibration
decisions.rationale: corrects exponential approach so arrival ≈ T_sel; accepted with P3 tech debt for speed-cap inaccuracy
int64 exact, scale cancels in normalization, avoids float precision loss at intergalactic scale

decisions.decision: Travel time slider in seconds (5s-3600s, default 120s)
decisions.rationale: user preference for short in-system warps

decisions.decision: Warp timing inaccuracy under WarpMaxSpeed cap filed as P3 tech debt
decisions.rationale: good enough for current distances and default slider value; fix approach documented
